config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society’s interests should automatically come before individual rights, because that can easily become an excuse for abuse by governments or majorities. In my view, individual rights are the foundation that keep society fair in the first place. Society matters a lot, but it should be built by protecting people, not by treating them as expendable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text:
Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika mayoritas atau pemerintah diberi kuasa terlalu besar atas individu, hasilnya sering berupa penyalahgunaan, diskriminasi, dan pembatasan kebebasan yang sulit dibalik. Hak individu memang tidak absolut dalam setiap situasi, tetapi beban pembuktiannya harus sangat berat sebelum hak itu dikorbankan demi klaim “kepentingan সমাজ.”  

Masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dari perlindungan terhadap orang per orang, bukan dari pengorbanan mereka atas nama tujuan kolektif yang kabur. Kalau tidak ada batas yang jelas, frasa “kepentingan masyarakat” bisa dipakai untuk membenarkan hampir apa pun.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the claim that society should generally take priority over the individual, because in Indonesia I have seen how “the common good” can be used to pressure people into silence or compliance. That does not mean individual rights are absolute in every case, but the default should be to protect the person first, then justify any limits very carefully and transparently. In a diverse country like ours, majority rule alone is not enough, because it can easily turn into the tyranny of the majority. Society is strongest when it respects the dignity and freedom of each individual, not when it treats people as disposable for an abstract collective goal.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari pengalaman Amerika, saya melihat betapa cepatnya “demi kebaikan bersama” berubah menjadi pembenaran untuk sensor, diskriminasi, atau perluasan kuasa negara yang berlebihan. Hak individu memang bisa dibatasi dalam keadaan tertentu, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa diuji, bukan diserahkan pada slogan yang kabur. Masyarakat yang kuat justru lahir ketika negara dan mayoritas dibatasi agar tidak mengorbankan martabat orang per orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should take priority over the individual as a general rule, because in Indonesia that kind of language is often used to pressure people into silence or obedience. At the same time, I do not believe individual rights are absolute in every situation, since public health, safety, and order sometimes require limits. But those limits must be narrow, transparent, and accountable, otherwise “society’s interests” becomes a convenient excuse for abuse by the powerful. A healthy society in my view is one that protects each person first, then justifies any restriction very carefully.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan secara umum di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, saya justru melihat bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi ruang terlalu besar atas nama “kebaikan bersama,” hasilnya sering berupa sensor, diskriminasi, dan penyalahgunaan kuasa yang merugikan orang biasa. Hak individu memang tidak mutlak dalam semua keadaan, terutama untuk keselamatan publik, tetapi pembatasannya harus sangat sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Tanpa batas yang tegas, istilah “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah dipakai sebagai alasan untuk mengorbankan martabat dan kebebasan orang per orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
